title: Unusual mods Russian Translation
description: Russian translations for mods. / Переводы модов на русский язык
body:
> **Ru: Описание**
- UMRT - ресурспак, добавляющий перевод модов minecraft на версии 1.20.x
- Перевод выполнен в максимально близком к оригинальному minecraft стилю.


> **En: Description**
- UMRT is a resource pack that adds the translation of minecraft mods on version 1.20.x
- The translation is made as close as possible to the original minecraft style.


<details>
<summary>Список переведенных модов:/ List of translated mods:</summary>
 
  _Peculiar primordials_ [https://modrinth.com/mod/peculiar-primordials](https://modrinth.com/mod/peculiar-primordials), [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/peculiar-primordials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/peculiar-primordials)

  _Odd organism_ [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/odd-organisms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/odd-organisms)

  _Hole_ [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hole](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hole)
Breezy https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/breezy

Automobility https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/automobility

 Ribbits [https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits)
 
 Clockwork https://modrinth.com/mod/create-clockwork
</details>
